findings.message: Detail page for role 'admin' does not import CrossRoleStrip from @/components/domain/cross-role-strip nor render <CrossRoleStrip />. The page renders an inline relatedRoles list instead. 385 of 386 entries under content/admin/ carry relatedRoles in frontmatter.
findings.fix: Mirror the commander detail page. Import CrossRoleStrip, build CrossRoleLink[] from fm.relatedRoles, and render <CrossRoleStrip links={crossRoleLinks} /> below the article body. Drop the inline list.

findings.message: Detail page for role 'leader' does not import CrossRoleStrip from @/components/domain/cross-role-strip nor render <CrossRoleStrip />. The page renders an inline relatedRoles list instead. 73 of 88 entries under content/leader/ carry relatedRoles in frontmatter.
findings.fix: Mirror the commander detail page. Import CrossRoleStrip, build CrossRoleLink[] from fm.relatedRoles, and render <CrossRoleStrip links={crossRoleLinks} /> below the article body. Drop the inline list.

findings.message: Detail page for role 'marine' does not import CrossRoleStrip from @/components/domain/cross-role-strip nor render <CrossRoleStrip />. The page renders an inline relatedRoles list instead. 219 of 221 entries under content/marines/ carry relatedRoles in frontmatter.
findings.fix: Mirror the commander detail page. Import CrossRoleStrip, build CrossRoleLink[] from fm.relatedRoles, and render <CrossRoleStrip links={crossRoleLinks} /> below the article body. Drop the inline list.

findings.message: MDX entry has no relatedRoles in frontmatter and no cross-role-exempt comment in the first 10 body lines.
findings.fix: Add a relatedRoles object to frontmatter, or add a {/* cross-role-exempt: <reason> */} comment at the top of the body.

findings.message: roleContentSchema (and adminSchema) defines relatedRoles as an object map of role to slug string. CLAUDE.md Section 9 lists `crossRole: CrossRoleLink[]` as the planned shape. The CrossRoleLink array form has not shipped on roleContentSchema.
findings.fix: Plan the migration from relatedRoles object to crossRole CrossRoleLink[] when ready. Author a codemod for existing frontmatter.
